original: A simplistic, almost crudely made, obsidian hoop piercing that is lined with savicite jewels on the lower half. While archaic in design, it is tipped with savicite, a highly sought after commodity. The psionic emissions from the raw jewels will likely leave you feeling a bit randy if worn.
